prompt: ImageIO.read returns null instead of the image. What is the bug?
choices: ImageIO.read throws FileNotFoundException instead of returning null for missing files
ImageIO.read returns null when it cannot decode the file (unsupported format or file not found); calling getWidth() on null throws NullPointerException — check for null before use
BMP files must be converted to PNG before ImageIO can read them
explanation: ImageIO.read() returns null when no registered reader can handle the file (or the file doesn't exist). Calling getWidth() on null causes NullPointerException. Fix: check if (img != null) before accessing the image, and verify the format is supported via ImageIO.getReaderFileSuffixes().
